name_en: Loewe🌟New Arrival Shiny Nappa Leather Paseo Bag, exquisite craftsmanship🆕Simple silhouette, elegant. Unique, soft pleated structure brings softness and ultra-light construction. This handbag is made of shiny Nappa leather. The top short handle is decorated with a Flamenco spiral knot. Crossbody or shoulder bag, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap* magnetic closure* one internal slip pocket* gold suede lining* Loewe hot stamping.
